layout.container: mobile-first responsive design. Main content centered on desktop within a max-width container (max-w-md).
layout.header: Sticky header. Background #FFCD00. Height 64px. Contains the official logo on the left and a 'Session sécurisée' lock indicator on the right.
layout.body: Background #F4F6F8. The main form should be inside a clean white card (#FFFFFF) with subtle shadows and border-radius.
layout.footer: Background #FFFFFF or light gray. Must include reassurance links ('Connexion sécurisée SSL', 'Protection des données', 'Service client 3639') and a discrete 'TIBER-FR / DORA Red Team exercise' mention for traceability.

components.buttons: Primary actions use #003B5C background with white text. Hover state #002840. Full width on mobile, rounded-md, text-lg font-medium. Use Shadcn Button.
components.inputs: Shadcn UI Input. Needs clear focus rings (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#003B5C]). Use clear top labels. Must support auto-formatting for card number and expiry.
components.cards: Shadcn Card or pure HTML div. White background, rounded-lg, shadow-sm, generous padding (p-6 sm:p-8).
components.progress_indicator: Step indicator visible on top of the form (e.g., 4 small horizontal bars or dots). Active step in #003B5C, upcoming steps in #E2E8F0.

logo.description: Official La Banque Postale logo. Must be used in the header.

user_journey_steps.title: Accueil
user_journey_steps.content: Landing page mimicking 'Mise à jour Certicode Plus' announcement. 'Continuer' CTA.

user_journey_steps.title: Connexion
user_journey_steps.content: Login form asking for 'Identifiant client' and 'Mot de passe' (mimicking the official LBP login).

user_journey_steps.title: Vérification
user_journey_steps.content: Carte bancaire details form: 16-digit card number (auto-formatted with spaces), Expiry (MM/AA), and Cryptogramme (CVV 3 digits).

user_journey_steps.title: Authentification
user_journey_steps.content: Mobile number entry and simulated SMS Certicode 6-digit code input page.

user_journey_steps.title: Succès
user_journey_steps.content: Success screen 'Votre Certicode Plus a été mis à jour'. Auto-redirects to https://www.labanquepostale.fr after 3 seconds.

accessibility_and_testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-submit'). Maintain high contrast for text.
instructions_to_main_agent: Implement this 4-step funnel using React state to manage steps. Include loading states (simulated server verification delay) between steps. Use 'lucide-react' for icons (Lock, CreditCard, Smartphone, CheckCircle). STRICTLY follow the provided brand colors (#FFCD00, #003B5C). Do NOT use generic placeholders; use the provided logo URL. Add the red team disclaimer discretely in the footer.
